---
title: "FairFund-Bench: Evaluating Deservingness Bias in LLM Allocation Decisions"
date: "2026-04-08"
categories: [working-paper]
authors: ["Martin Lukk"]
year: 2026
pub_project: algorithmic-fairness
slides: "/assets/presentations/2026-04-snack-fairfund/slides.pdf"
abstract: >
  In preparation. Presented at the SNACK Workshop, University of
  Toronto Department of Sociology, April 2026.
---

::: {.abstract}
{{< meta abstract >}}
:::
